rationale_source: F1.FB broker_correction cross-tier precedence: broker > docs always per R10-G framing, even when docs-tier is mortgage_statement (authoritative within docs)

first_mortgage_balance.rationale: mortgage_statement $225k; broker correction $222.5k (post-statement payment). F1.FB broker_correction tier wins per R10-G cross-tier precedence (broker > docs always, regardless of doc-tier authority).
